items.title: Is Saudi Arabia's sports revolution unravelling?
items.dek: Saudi Arabia will withdraw its multi-billion dollar backing of LIV Golf, but what does this mean for the country's other sporting investments? Dan Roan takes a
items.body: Saudi Arabia will withdraw its multi-billion dollar backing of LIV Golf, but what does this mean for the country's other sporting investments? Dan Roan takes a closer look.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Brazil's Congress approves plan to drastically cut Bolsonaro's jail term
items.dek: Last year ex-president Jair Bolsonaro was sentenced to 27 years in jail for plotting a coup after losing an election.
items.body: Last year ex-president Jair Bolsonaro was sentenced to 27 years in jail for plotting a coup after losing an election.
items.author: IriLine Desk
